mapper.select:
SELECT f.id, f.name, f.parent_id, f.owner_id, f.file_type, f.size, f.mime_type, f.storage_path, f.visibility, f.department_id, f.is_deleted, f.deleted_at, f.created_at, f.updated_at, u.name AS owner_name, d.name AS department_name FROM gw_files f JOIN itsm_users u ON f.owner_id = u.id LEFT JOIN gw_departments d ON f.department_id = d.id WHERE f.is_deleted = false
AND f.parent_id = #{parentId}
AND f.parent_id IS NULL
AND (f.department_id = #{departmentId} OR f.visibility = 'PUBLIC')
AND (f.owner_id = #{ownerId} OR f.visibility = 'PUBLIC')
ORDER BY f.file_type DESC, f.name ASC

SELECT f.id, f.name, f.parent_id, f.owner_id, f.file_type, f.size, f.mime_type, f.storage_path, f.visibility, f.department_id, f.is_deleted, f.deleted_at, f.created_at, f.updated_at, u.name AS owner_name, d.name AS department_name FROM gw_files f JOIN itsm_users u ON f.owner_id = u.id LEFT JOIN gw_departments d ON f.department_id = d.id WHERE f.is_deleted = false AND f.visibility IN ('PUBLIC', 'DEPARTMENT') ORDER BY f.created_at DESC

SELECT f.id, f.name, f.parent_id, f.owner_id, f.file_type, f.size, f.mime_type, f.storage_path, f.visibility, f.department_id, f.is_deleted, f.deleted_at, f.created_at, f.updated_at, u.name AS owner_name, d.name AS department_name FROM gw_files f JOIN itsm_users u ON f.owner_id = u.id LEFT JOIN gw_departments d ON f.department_id = d.id WHERE f.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gw_files (name, parent_id, owner_id, file_type, size, mime_type, storage_path, visibility, department_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{parentId}, #{ownerId}, #{fileType}, #{size}, #{mimeType}, #{storagePath}, #{visibility}, #{departmentId})
mapper.update: UPDATE gw_files SET name = #{name}, visibility = #{visibility}, department_id = #{departmentId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE gw_files SET is_deleted = true, deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
